message.content:
This profile screen belongs to a sports simulation app (likely a football/soccer manager game) with a **dark theme** (black background, dark gray UI elements) and a clean, organized layout. Here’s a detailed breakdown:


### **1. Header & Navigation**
- **Top Bar**:  
  - Left: "Home" button (white text, rounded rectangle).  
  - Right: "My Account" button (white text, rounded rectangle with a user icon).  
- **Profile Title**:  
  - Large text: "y 38-0" (likely a username, e.g., "Your 38-0").  
  - Subtitle: "Your history, trophies and streaks." (light gray text).  
  - Right: "Sign out" button (white text, small rounded rectangle).  


### **2. Quick Stats Section**
A grid of 8 stat cards (2 columns, 4 rows) with **white text** on dark gray backgrounds:  
- **Seasons**: 7  
- **Best points**: 87  
- **Best record**: 27W 6D 5L  
- **Win rate**: 62%  
- **Most goals in a season**: 85  
- **Top-rated XI**: 88  
- **Titles**: 2  
- **Perfect (38-0)**: 0  

Below this:  
- "Favourite formation": 4-3-3 (white text).  


### **3. Streaks Section**
- **Title**: "STREAKS" (white text, with a dropdown arrow).  
- 4 cards (2 columns, 2 rows) with icons and stats:  
  - **Daily streak**: 🔥 2 days (subtext: "Days in a row you’ve played - longest 2").  
  - **Unbeaten run**: 🛡️ 0 (subtext: "Seasons in a row without losing a game - longest 0").  
  - **Title run**: 🏆 1 (subtext: "Titles won in a row - longest 1").  
  - **On the up**: 📈 2 (subtext: "Seasons in a row beating your last points total - longest 2").  


### **4. Nations Trophy Section**
- **Title**: "NATIONS TROPHY" (yellow text, bold).  
- **Button**: "Play Nations Trophy →" (yellow text, rounded rectangle).  
- **Trophy Card**:  
  - "Nations Trophy Winner - EXCLUSIVE" (yellow text).  
  - Subtext: "Win the Nations Trophy to unlock this trophy." (light gray).  
- **Stats Grid** (4 columns, 2 rows):  
  - Tournaments Played: 1  
  - Completed: 1  
  - Nations Trophies Won: 0  
  - Finals Reached: 0  
  - Semi-Finals Reached: 0  
  - Best Finish: Quarter-final  
  - Latest Result: Quarter-final  
  - Latest Run: 28 Jun 2026  
  - Best XI Rating: 83  


### **5. Trophy Cabinet Section**
- **Title**: "TROPHY CABINET" (white text, dropdown arrow).  
- **Trophies** (vertical list, each with an icon, title, and subtext):  
  - 38-0: 🏆 (subtext: "Win all 38 games").  
  - Invincible: 🛡️ (subtext: "Go the whole season unbeaten (0 losses)").  
  - Nations Trophy Winner - EXCLUSIVE: 🏆 (subtext: "Win the 38-0 Nations Trophy tournament").  
  - Champions: 🥇 (subtext: "Finish 1st" + "x2" badge).  
  - Top Four: ⭐ (subtext: "Finish in the top 4" + "x7" badge).  
  - It’s Coming Home: 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 (subtext: "Win the league with an all-English starting XI").  
  - Century of Goals: ⚽ (subtext: "Score 100+ goals in the season").  
  - Iron Curtain: 🛡️ (subtext: "Concede 10 goals or fewer all season").  
  - Fortress Defence: 🛡️ (subtext: "Concede 20 goals or fewer").  
  - Worse Than Derby: 🐑 (subtext: "Finish on 10 points or fewer").  
  - Relegated: 📉 (subtext: "Finish 18th or lower, down you go").  
  - Streets Won’t Forget: 👑 (subtext: "Field 5+ cult-hero players").  
  - Dad’s Army: 👴 (subtext: "Field a full XI of players with 10+ top-flight seasons").  
  - Rest of the World: 🌍 (subtext: "Field a full XI with no British or Irish players").  
  - United Nations: 🌐 (subtext: "Field a full XI of 11 different nationalities").  
- **Footer**: "+39 secret trophies to discover 👁️" (light gray text).  


### **6. Season Milestones Section**
- **Title**: "SEASON MILESTONES" (white text, dropdown arrow).  
- **Badges**:  
  - "First Season" (green badge, leaf icon).  
  - "5 Seasons" (gray badge, clock icon).  
  - "10 Seasons · 7/10" (gray badge, lock icon).  


### **7. One-Club XI Trophies Section**
- **Title**: "ONE-CLUB XI TROPHIES" (white text, dropdown arrow).  
- **Best Team Card**:  
  - "BEST TEAM" (white text).  
  - "87 pts · 1st" (white text, bold).  
  - Subtext: "Won 27 · Drew 6 · Lost 5 · 4-3-3 · Team 86" (light gray).  
  - Icons: 🥇⭐ (gold/silver).  
- **Worst Team Card**:  
  - "WORST TEAM" (white text).  
  - "73 pts · 2nd" (white text, bold).  
  - Subtext: "Won 22 · Drew 7 · Lost 9 · 4-3-3 · Team 85" (light gray).  
  - Icon: ⭐ (silver).  


### **8. Recent Runs Section**
- **Title**: "RECENT RUNS" (white text, dropdown arrow).  
- **Subtext**: "Tap a run to see the XI you fielded." (light gray).  
- **Run Cards** (vertical list, each with stats and icons):  
  - 87 pts · 1st (Won 27 · Drew 6 · Lost 5 · Scored 82 · Conceded 3...). Icons: 🥇⭐.  
  - 74 pts · 3rd (Won 22 · Drew 8 · Lost 8 · Scored 69 · Conceded 35...). Icon: ⭐.  
  - 73 pts · 2nd (Won 22 · Drew 7 · Lost 9 · Scored 68 · Conceded 44...). Icon: ⭐.  
  - 73 pts · 2nd (Won 23 · Drew 4 · Lost 11 · Scored 78 · Conceded 40...). Icon: ⭐.  
  - 76 pts · 3rd (Won 23 · Drew 7 · Lost 8 · Scored 74 · Conceded 38...). Icon: ⭐.  
  - 78 pts · 1st (Won 24 · Drew 6 · Lost 8 · Scored 71 · Conceded 2...). Icons: 🥇⭐.  
  - 82 pts · 2nd (Won 25 · Drew 7 · Lost 6 · Scored 85 · Conceded 31...). Icon: ⭐.  
- **Button**: "Simulate a new run →" (teal text, rounded rectangle).  


### **9. Account Settings Section**
- **Title**: "ACCOUNT SETTINGS" (white text).  
- **Display Name**:  
  - Label: "Display name" (white text).  
  - Subtext: "The name shown on your leagues. Changing it updates every league you’ve joined." (light gray).  
  - Input field: "111" (dark gray, placeholder text).  
  - "Save" button (teal, rounded rectangle).  
- **Checkboxes**:  
  - "Email me occasional 38-0 updates and news." (unchecked, light gray text).  
  - "Hide my name on this page." (unchecked, light gray text).  
- **Button**: "Delete account" (red text, rounded rectangle).  


### **10. Footer**
- **Navigation Links**: "Home", "Play", "How to Play", "Greatest XI", "How It Works", "Leaderboard", "Story", "Get the App" (white text).  
- **Links**: "Feedback & bugs" (white text, rounded rectangle).  
- **Copyright**: "© 2026 38-0.app. All rights reserved." (light gray).  
- **Policy Links**: "Partners", "Privacy & Cookies Policy", "Terms of Use", "Cookie Settings" (light gray).  
- **Disclaimer**: Long text about the app being fan-made, not affiliated with real football clubs, and using fictional data (light gray).  


### **Color Scheme**
- **Background**: Black (#000000).  
- **UI Elements**: Dark gray (#1a1a1a or similar) for cards/sections.  
- **Text**: White (primary), light gray (secondary), yellow (accent for "Nations Trophy"), teal (accent for buttons), red (for "Delete account").  
- **Icons**: Gold (🥇), silver (⭐), teal (🔥/🛡️), etc.  


### **Layout**
- **Vertical Flow**: Sections are stacked vertically, with clear spacing between them.  
- **Grids**: Stats and Nations Trophy stats use 2-column grids.  
- **Cards**: Each section (stats, streaks, trophies) uses rounded rectangular cards for organization.  
- **Dropdowns**: Some sections (Streaks, Trophy Cabinet, Season Milestones) have dropdown arrows for expandability.  


This design prioritizes readability (high contrast between text and background) and easy navigation, with a focus on showcasing the user’s achievements, stats, and game history.
